title: thyrsia zea
intro: Thyrsia zea, also known as the Indian dill or Anethum graveolens var. zea, is a plant species native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its carminative and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and relieve muscle spasms. The health benefits of Thyrsia zea include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a useful herb for treating colds and coughs. The herbal preparations of Thyrsia zea typically involve infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using its essential oil in aromatherapy and topical applications.
